title: OSM Hamburg hybrid fixture
summary: Synthetic hybrid Commons fixture representing a local OpenStreetMap community relation with digital mapping infrastructure.

aspects.label: Open data
aspects.description: The digital extension is reusable public map data and related knowledge.

aspects.label: Community mapping
aspects.description: The local anchor represents people maintaining shared map knowledge around a place.

aspects.label: Public infrastructure
aspects.description: The project model validates shared civic infrastructure across local and digital projections.

location.label: Hamburg, Germany; city-level synthetic hybrid fixture
location.privacy_note: Approximate city-level coordinate for validating hybrid projections; not an exact meeting point.

provenance.summary: Fixture entry; it must not be shown as a real public catalog item.

curation.notes: Synthetic test data for projection contract validation.

requirements: No join, manage or decide action until a weltgewebe project identity exists.
